title: Can I List a Car Being Sold for Parts?

content:
# Can I List a Car Being Sold for Parts?

It's a common question for many UK car owners: "My car's seen better days, can I list a car being sold for parts?" The short answer is yes, absolutely! At BuyAndScrap.com, we understand not every vehicle is destined for a new life on the road. Sometimes, a car's true value lies in its components, and we connect you with buyers looking for those parts.

## Why Sell Your Car for Parts?

Selling a car for parts makes good sense for a few reasons:

### When Repairs Are Too Costly
If your engine's blown, gearbox kaput, or it's been in an accident, repair costs can outweigh the car's market value. Instead of paying to scrap it, someone might buy it for its still-useful components, letting you recoup some cash.

### Giving Life to Other Vehicles
Many enthusiasts and mechanics seek specific parts to repair or upgrade other vehicles. Your old headlight, a good door, or a functioning electrical component could be exactly what someone else needs to get their car back on the road.

## Listing Your Parts Car on BuyAndScrap.com

When you decide to list a car being sold for parts, clear and honest communication is key. Here’s what to consider:

### Be Specific About Condition
Describe the car's overall condition accurately. Highlight working parts and any major faults. High-quality photos from various angles will greatly help potential buyers.

### Whole Car vs. Individual Parts
Our platform connects you with buyers for a *whole car* to be dismantled for parts. We recommend selling the entire vehicle rather than individual components. Selling a whole car, even for parts, is usually simpler legally and logistically. Buyers of "parts cars" often transport non-running vehicles and handle dismantling.

### DVLA & V5C Considerations
If you're selling the whole car for parts, you'll still need to notify the DVLA. Give the new owner the V5C/2 new keeper supplement and send the V5C/3 tear-off section to the DVLA. The new owner then takes responsibility. Ensure they understand their obligations for proper disposal or re-registration.

Selling a car for parts can be a fantastic way to get value from a non-runner. So, if you're asking, "can I list a car being sold for parts?" the answer is a resounding yes on BuyAndScrap.com!
